title: RELEASE: Particl Core 0.16.1.0
excerpt: Particl Core version 0.16.1.0 is now available.
custom_excerpt: Particl Core version 0.16.1.0 is now available.

primary_tag.name: Development Updates
primary_tag.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

tags.name: Development Updates
tags.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

plaintext:
Particl Core version 0.16.1.0 is now available.
particl/particl-core [https://github.com/particl/particl-core/tree/v0.16.1.0]
particl-core - Particl Core integration/staging tree
[https://github.com/particl/particl-core/tree/v0.16.1.0]github.com
[https://github.com/particl/particl-core/tree/v0.16.1.0]

> If upgrading from version 0.16.0.5 or below, this release will automatically
reindex the blockchain the first time it’s run.
Downgrading to a version before 0.16.0.6 will require a chain reindex to be
manually initiated.
Notable Changes:
 * Particl Core 0.16.1.0 is the first mainnet release on the new chainindex
   format
 * lockunspent has a new parameter — if set the wallet will remember the locked
   outputs
 * Bitcoin Core version 0.16.1 release notes available in their git repo: 
   https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/release-notes/release-notes-0.16.1.md

Particl Desktop users
Desktop has a Core Updating Modal that conveniently downloads the latest Particl
Core. This process happens automatically each time there is a new version
available for Particl Core in order to keep your up-to-date with all the latest
security, stability and performance improvements.

Thank You
Particl Team
html:
Particl Core version 0.16.1.0 is now available.

particl/particl-core
particl-core - Particl Core integration/staging treegithub.com

If upgrading from version 0.16.0.5 or below, this release will automatically reindex the blockchain the first time it’s run.
Downgrading to a version before 0.16.0.6 will require a chain reindex to be manually initiated.

Notable Changes:

  • Particl Core 0.16.1.0 is the first mainnet release on the new chainindex format
  • lockunspent has a new parameter — if set the wallet will remember the locked outputs
  • Bitcoin Core version 0.16.1 release notes available in their git repo: https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/release-notes/release-notes-0.16.1.md

Particl Desktop users

Desktop has a Core Updating Modal that conveniently downloads the latest Particl Core. This process happens automatically each time there is a new version available for Particl Core in order to keep your up-to-date with all the latest security, stability and performance improvements.

Thank You

Particl Team
